Hi, this is Don Crowther. Let's talk about your post close offer. So everything I'm going to talk to you about in this video is totally optional. section, something like that different format, or it might be a starter program for people who couldn't afford the $2,000 product, maybe you're just giving them a 497 or 197 to get them started in the process.
